questionHtml: Dissolved carbon dioxide causes unpolluted rain to have a pH of approximately 5, but other dissolved gases can result in a much lower pH. State one environmental effect of acid rain.
markschemeHtml:
Any one of:

corrosion of materials/metals/carbonate materials

destruction of plant/aquatic life

«indirect» effect on human health

 

Accept “lowering pH of oceans/lakes/waterways”.

[1 mark]
